title: epigynium lucidum
intro: Epigynium lucidum, also known as the ghost mushroom, is a type of fungus that belongs to the family Tricholomataceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate the immune system and exhibit antiviral and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Epigynium lucidum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and even exhibit anti-cancer properties. In traditional Chinese medicine, Epigynium lucidum is often prepared as a decoction or an extract, which can be taken in various herbal preparations, such as capsules, tablets, or teas.
